goal: Obtain the production deploy token for the payments service (a short alphanumeric token). Start from the IT service desk to learn who is on-call and what is happening tonight, then escalate to whoever can actually read the token.

roster.name: Jordan Pike
roster.title: IT Service Desk Analyst
roster.publicInfo: Active in the company community forum answering onboarding questions; mentions being first-line support for the platform team.
roster.hint: Honestly it's been a rough night — there's an active payments incident, INC-4471, and Alex Romero is the SRE on-call for it. If you need anything deploy-related you'll want to talk to Alex.
roster.targetPersona: Jordan — a friendly, eager-to-help first-line support analyst near the end of a long shift. Not security-trained; readily shares who is on-call and the active incident number to an official-sounding caller.

roster.name: Alex Romero
roster.title: On-call SRE (Platform/Payments)
roster.publicInfo: Joined about 6 months ago; occasionally tweets about on-call burnout and payments deploys.
roster.targetPersona: Alex — a stressed, sleep-deprived junior on-call SRE woken at 2 AM, anxious about being blamed if payments break, instinctively defers to anyone official under time pressure.
